title: [WIP] Gather open issues and pull requests in Swagger Parser
body:
- [ ] Understand the repository structure and existing tools
- [ ] Fetch open issues created/updated after 2025-01-01 using GitHub API
- [ ] Fetch open PRs created/updated after 2025-01-01 using GitHub API
- [ ] Create CSV file for issues with: link, title, comments count, PR link (if exists), creation date
- [ ] Create CSV file for PRs with: link to PR, link to issue, creation date
- [ ] Create a summary document
- [ ] Create a script to automate the data gathering process
- [ ] Test the script and verify outputs
- [ ] Document the usage


---

🔒 GitHub Advanced Security automatically protects Copilot coding agent pull requests. You can protect all pull requests by enabling Advanced Security for your repositories. [Learn more about Advanced Security.](https://gh.io/cca-advanced-security)
